name: markpad-pixel-scroll-sync-frontmatter
title: Markpad: pixel-based synchronized scrolling with frontmatter
original_prompt: Poprawić synchronizowane przewijanie: obecne mapowanie po liniach/sourcepos nie bierze pod uwagę zwiniętego/rozwiniętego frontmatter ani różnych wielkości czcionek między edytorem i renderem. Synchronizacja ma liczyć graficzną pozycję w pikselach.

entries.note: Started implementation. Root cause: scroll sync still uses line/sourcepos anchors, which ignores frontmatter panel height and editor/preview font/layout differences. Plan is to replace runtime sync with pixel segment mapping while keeping sourcepos anchors only for saved tab position.

Implemented pixel-segment scroll sync. Editor now emits/applies ScrollSyncPosition {section, ratio}; preview maps the same contract using actual frontmatter panel DOM height. Sourcepos anchor code remains only for saved tab anchor lines. svelte-check passes with 0 errors and 0 warnings.

Verification complete: npm run check reports 0 errors/0 warnings; npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts passes 59/59; git diff --check passes; Windows cargo build succeeds with RUSTFLAGS pointing at local target/mingw-case-libs; cargo test --release --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu --no-run compiles lib/main test executables. Portable release refreshed at release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe with SHA256 f4fb9ecb773ae447eec1a5cdc4e8d8508bfa24034e6c70b6571fae5315d25950. Native Linux cargo test remains blocked by missing GTK/WebKit system libraries in WSL; tauri bundler created the exe but full bundling exits on missing TAURI_SIGNING_PRIVATE_KEY for updater signing.

Final release verification corrected after the GNU artifact issue: npm run check reports 0 errors/0 warnings; npx tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts passes 59/59; npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci exits 0; /tmp/markpad-windows-build.log has no warning:/Warning:/WARN/error: matches; release/windows/Markpad_2.6.11_x64.exe was refreshed from the MSVC cargo-xwin target; SHA256SUMS validates with SHA256 954fdf6c199c1435158f820d59983c9e146b1799cd46181db79034e4cdf0cba2; objdump import scan finds no WebView2Loader.dll or VCRUNTIME import; git diff --check passes.

verification.outcome: PASS: svelte-check found 0 errors and 0 warnings.

verification.command: npm run tauri build -- --runner cargo-xwin --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --no-bundle --ci
verification.outcome: PASS: full Tauri Windows MSVC build completed and produced src-tauri/target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/Markpad.exe.
PASS: no WebView2Loader.dll or VCRUNTIME imports were found.

final_result: Pixel-based editor-preview scroll synchronization accounts for frontmatter and differing layouts. The Windows release artifact was rebuilt with the full cargo-xwin/MSVC Tauri path and refreshed in release/windows.
